Water Play Friday

Friday, March 27, 2026

What Caleb learned today

  • Cause and effect: pouring water in, watching it come out, learning that his actions make things happen
  • Fine motor skills: gripping cups, scooping water, controlling the pour with both hands
  • Sensory exploration: feeling water temperature, wet vs dry, splashing textures
  • Early science thinking: experimenting with dumping, filling, and volume
